browserManager.title: Browser manager
browserManager.subtitle: Download real Chrome builds on demand — installed automatically.
browserManager.errCatalogUnreachable: Could not reach the browser catalog. Check your internet connection.

quickGenerate.title: Quick generate
quickGenerate.newGroupHint: Press Enter or Save to create it now — otherwise it’s created when you generate.
quickGenerate.uniqueFingerprintDetail: — distinct UA & version, GPU, screen, CPU, MAC & device each
quickGenerate.startupLinksHint: (optional — one per line, opens on launch)
quickGenerate.qualityHint: Narrows the pool to matching proxies before the health check runs.
quickGenerate.assignUnique: Assign a unique proxy to each profile (1:1)
quickGenerate.assignUniqueDetail: Each profile gets its own unused proxy. If you request more profiles than you have free proxies, only that many are created. Uncheck to reuse proxies round-robin.
quickGenerate.errNewGroupName: Enter a name for the new group.
quickGenerate.errNoPoolProxies: No proxies in the pool — add some first, or paste a list.
quickGenerate.errNoPasted: Paste at least one proxy, or pick another option.

shareProfile.description: Grant a team member access to the selected profiles, or revoke it. Delete stays restricted to admins.
shareProfile.noMembers: No other members to share with yet. Invite members from the Members page.
